data.name: Valentine's Day 💘
data.detailed_description:
Riley and Bianca are co-workers and new best friends. When Riley tells Bianca to come to her Valentine’s Day party wearing leather and latex, Bianca can’t wait and shows up right on time. But no one else is there. Was she wrong about the party? Turns out Riley has a surprise up her sleeve. Or is it under her own latex skirt!

Key Features

• Visual Novel about the sexual adventures of two girlfriends

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Ultra HD 4K (3840x2160 pixels) resolution graphics

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Girl fucked by Futanari

• Girl's and Futa's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: Riley planned a special Valentine’s Day party, and Bianca was sure her new bestie had invited all their friends. But when she shows up wearing her best latex and leather, she quickly realizes Riley invited only one special guest – Bianca! Thing is, it’s Riley who’s got something special going on!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
